title: How to Assign Profile
excerpt: Step-by-step guide on how to how to assign profile.
content: This document outlines the step-by-step process for: How to Assign Profile.

steps.title: Assign Profile
steps.action: Go to Actions Tab and select "Assign Profile"

steps.title: Select user and profile
steps.action:
Select the user and profile, then perform an SoD analysis to validate compliance before submitting the profile assignment request.

Note: Profiles can only be assigned after completing the SoD (Segregation of Duties) analysis, reviewing any detected violations, and acknowledging the associated risks and responsibilities.

title: How to Assign Role Manager
excerpt: Step-by-step guide on how to how to assign role manager.
content: This document outlines the step-by-step process for: How to Assign Role Manager.

steps.title: Review role information
steps.action: Open the role details page and review the role information, users, and authorization details.

steps.title: Assign Manager
steps.action: In the Role Managers section, click Assign Manager.

steps.title: Select Role Manager
steps.action: Search for and select the user to be assigned as the Role Manager.

steps.title: Enable Escalation Approver
steps.action: (Optional) Enable Set as Escalation Approver if the manager should handle escalated approval requests.

steps.title: Save assignment
steps.action: Click Assign to save the Role Manager assignment.

title: How to Assign Roles in "Roles" Tab
excerpt: Step-by-step guide on how to how to assign roles in "roles" tab.
content: This document outlines the step-by-step process for: How to Assign Roles in "Roles" Tab.

steps.title: Click Assign in Roles tab
steps.action: In Roles tab Click "Assign"

steps.title: Assign SAP roles to user
steps.action:
Assign SAP roles to a user by selecting the user, choosing required roles, defining validity dates, performing SoD analysis, and providing business justification.

SoD (Segregation of Duties) Analysis detects potential access conflicts and compliance risks before role assignment. Roles can be assigned only after all identified violations are reviewed, acknowledged, and justified, ensuring secure and compliant access provisioning.

title: How to Assign Roles
excerpt: Step-by-step guide on how to how to assign roles.
content: This document outlines the step-by-step process for: How to Assign Roles.

steps.title: Select Assign Role
steps.action: Go to Actions Tab and select "Assign Role"

steps.title: Assign SAP roles to user
steps.action:
Assign SAP roles to a user by selecting the user, choosing required roles, defining validity dates, performing SoD analysis, and providing business justification.

SoD (Segregation of Duties) Analysis detects potential access conflicts and compliance risks before role assignment. Roles can be assigned only after all identified violations are reviewed, acknowledged, and justified, ensuring secure and compliant access provisioning.

title: How to Compare Roles and Analyze Risk
excerpt: Step-by-step guide on how to how to compare roles and analyze risk.
content: This document outlines the step-by-step process for: How to Compare Roles and Analyze Risk.

steps.title: Start new comparison
steps.action: Navigate to Access Control → Role Lens and click Start New Comparison.

steps.title: Select roles to compare
steps.action: Search for and select 2–4 SAP roles to compare, then click Compare Roles.

steps.title: Review comparison results
steps.action: Review the comparison results, including T-Code overlap, Authorization Objects, and Permissions across the selected roles.

title: How to Create Users
excerpt: Step-by-step guide on how to how to create users.
content: This document outlines the step-by-step process for: How to Create Users.

steps.title: Navigate to Access Control
steps.action: Navigate to Access Control

steps.title: Select Users tab
steps.action: Select the "Users" tab

steps.title: Select Add User
steps.action: Go to Actions Tab and Select "Add User"

steps.title: Fill in user details
steps.action: Fill in SAP user details, assign roles/profiles, and configure account settings to create a new user.

title: How to Revoke Profile
excerpt: Step-by-step guide on how to how to revoke profile.
content: This document outlines the step-by-step process for: How to Revoke Profile.

steps.title: Select Revoke Profile
steps.action: Go to Actions Tab and select "Revoke Profile"

steps.title: Select User
steps.action: Select the user, choose the profile(s) to remove, provide a valid business justification, and submit the profile removal request for approval.

title: How to Revoke Roles in "Roles" Tab
excerpt: Step-by-step guide on how to how to revoke roles in "roles" tab.
content: This document outlines the step-by-step process for: How to Revoke Roles in "Roles" Tab.

steps.title: Click Revoke in Roles tab
steps.action: In Roles tab Click "Revoke"

steps.title: Select user and role to revoke
steps.action: Select the user and role to be revoked, then provide a business justification to submit the role removal request for approval and processing.

title: How to Revoke Roles
excerpt: Step-by-step guide on how to how to revoke roles.
content: This document outlines the step-by-step process for: How to Revoke Roles.

steps.title: Select Revoke Role
steps.action: Go to Actions Tab and select "Revoke Role"

steps.title: Select user and role to revoke
steps.action: Select the user and role to be revoked, then provide a business justification to submit the role removal request for approval and processing.

title: How to Simulate Role Changes & Analyze Risks
excerpt: Step-by-step guide on how to how to simulate role changes & analyze risks.
content: This document outlines the step-by-step process for: How to Simulate Role Changes & Analyze Risks.

steps.title: Select target user
steps.action: Open Role Simulator and select the target user.

steps.title: Add or remove roles
steps.action: Add or remove roles to create the proposed access scenario.

steps.title: Run simulation
steps.action: Click Run Simulation to evaluate access and SoD impact.

steps.title: Review risk score
steps.action: Review the risk score, new violations, and resolved violations.
